candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current borrowings; excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Also matches STD concept, but appears overlapping with ST Bank Loans in overlapping years and could double count if both are summed.
Debt-related, but label is not explicitly current and may include non-current debt.
Current debt-like item but lease liabilities should be excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: Selected only ST Bank Loans to avoid double counting with Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases, which appears to be an overlapping alternate label in some years. Lease liabilities excluded per rule.
